title: HOUSING ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: REGION 10 HOUSING ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists with rent and rental deposits. Assistance is available once in a 12-month period. 527 SE Baseline Street Suite G Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Agricultural workers with household income at or below 60% of the Area Median Income. Legal immigration status is not required. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 245-2600 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 245-2600 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for an appointment or more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Tillamook, Washington, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon, 1pm-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Between SE Baseline and SE Oak Streets; near the Hillsboro Transit Center. Use TriMet bus #57. Services: Rent Payment Assistance * Agricultural Laborers Rental Deposit Assistance * Agricultural Laborers Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - NATIONAL FARMWORKER JOBS PROGRAM UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. REGION 10
